description_long: This is a modern rectangular cabinet or console table with a wood-textured top and two front-facing drawers. The tabletop features a light gray wood grain finish, while the legs and drawer faces are a contrasting off-white or beige color. The drawers are equipped with small, square knobs for easy opening, and the overall design is minimalist with clean, straight lines. The legs are slightly tapered, giving the piece a contemporary yet functional appearance. There are no visible glass panels or decorative elements, emphasizing practicality and simplicity. This piece would be suitable for use in urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or residential entryways.
description: A modern rectangular cabinet with a wood-textured top, two front drawers, and tapered off-white legs. Minimalist design with small square knobs and a clean, functional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood-textured top, off-white legs, and the plain front panel with no visible drawer handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the tabletop and the straight, tapered legs; no drawers or handles visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two front drawers with small square knobs and the same wood-textured top and off-white legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the tabletop thickness and leg design without any visible drawers.
